leadText: Psyshield Bash (Japanese: バリアーラッシュ Barrier Rush) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Stantler and Wyrdeer.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.2 Generation IX 1.3 Other effects Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Psyshield Bash inflicts damage and raises the user's defensive stats. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 10 Agile Strong Power 70 55 85 Accuracy 90% 90% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Turns 3 2 4 ? ? ? ? Raises the user's defensive stats Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Psyshield Bash inflicts damage and raises the user's Defense by one stage. Other effects [ edit | edit source ] A Stantler that has used Psyshield Bash in the agile style at least 20 times can evolve into Wyrdeer .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This may also raise the user’s defensive stats. S V Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user’s Defense stat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Psyshield Bash's description says it "may raise the user's defensive stats", despite it in fact having a 100% chance to do so. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , Psyshield Bash is the only Evolution -inducing move introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus to lack an Evolution effect, as Stantler cannot evolve into Wyrdeer in the games.
